keyPoints: Bummer! UFC Oklahoma City loses big fight one week before fight night
whyMatters: Noticia de actualidad en el sector de deportes.
fullArticle:
Ultimate Fighting Championship (UFC) Welterweight fan favorite Kevin Holland was scheduled to collide with undefeated rising prospect Jacobe Smith at UFC Oklahoma City next weekend (Sat., July 18, 2026) inside Paycom Center in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma.

Holland has suffered an injury and has been forced out of the matchup, according to social media user Kevin K, who was first to report the news. It is currently unclear if Smith will remain on the card or if UFC will be able to find him a replacement opponent on short notice.

Holland (29-15-1) was coming off a unanimous decision victory over Randy Brown at UFC 327, which snapped a two-fight skid. Before that win, “Trailblazer” suffered back-to-back defeats against Mike Malott and Daniel Rodriguez.
